function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request yet because it specifies OCR for five files, but only four readable targets are available. Please provide the correct fifth target so I can process the full set in one pass.
function.rulebook_notes: process-next-inbox-item.md requires completing the request from canonical evidence; inbox-processing-v2-update.md says if not doable, do not leave partial edits; global outcome rules require clarification instead of partial processing when a referenced file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request (00_inbox/724_next-task.md) explicitly asks to OCR five files. After reading all available listed purchase records, only four target files are readable under 50_finance/purchases. Because the request is incomplete/missing required data and partial completion is disallowed, clarification is required.
